## Technical Architecture Checklist
*Please replace `[ ]` with `[x]` to confirm your design choices:*
* [ ] Implemented automated data extraction layer.
* [ ] Implemented a relational state database (SQLite/PostgreSQL/Supabase/etc.).
* [ ] Implemented AI personalization layer (Ollama/Gemini/etc.).
* [ ] Implemented 1-minute human-in-the-loop gate.
* [ ] Implemented programmatic transactional email dispatch.

## Architectural Summary
Provide a 2-3 sentence overview of your system architecture and why your chosen tools are the most resilient for a zero-cost scale.
